description: Signaling state such as errors or required fields using color alone, invisible to color-blind and low-vision users.
body: Failure mode: validity, selection, or required status is conveyed only by a color change (e.g. a red border) with no text, icon, or shape cue, so users who cannot distinguish the color get no signal. Detection signals: error state has no message or icon; a color-blindness simulator hides the cue; contrast of the colored cue is below threshold. Do not encode meaning in color alone. Safer fallback: pair every color cue with text or an icon, ensure the cue meets contrast thresholds, and confirm the meaning survives a grayscale or color-blind simulation.
